race.description: William Hill Each Way Extra Challenge Series Handicap Hurdle (0-100)
race.comment: DOLLY WATKINS (5) has resumed in great form. Close second first up and built on that when going clear for a 6L win at Down Royal. Weight rise is manageable and expected to prove hard to beat once more. SEAN MC (2) stayed on well for a 2L win at Wexford. Will relish this extra distance and there could be a lot more to come yet. Keep safe. MIDLETON RARE (1) showed a great attitude when a 1.5L winner at Bellewstown. Confidence will be high now bidding to go back to back. LIVE TO LAUGH (4) is thriving at present and comes into this looking for a third consecutive victory. Switch back to hurdles not sure to suit having improved when chasing. Hard to rule out in current form.
